items.title: Crude Oil Price Today (June 15): Oil hits March lows, down 4% as US-Iran sign peace deal. What are experts saying?
items.desc: Brent Crude oil price : Brent crude futures fell $3.58, or 4.10%, to $83.75 a barrel, while U.S. West Texas Intermediate crude declined $4.01, or 4.72%, to $80.87. Both benchmarks had already fallen more than 3% on Friday.
